features: Dual Mode Precision Recording: Phone Call Recording Mode and Note Recording Mode. Our Al Voice Recorder features a dual recording engine, capturing high-quality ambient sounds with the air conduction sensor for meetings and presentations, while the Vibration Conduction Sensor ensures clear call recordings by capturing internal phone sounds

Voice Recorder AI Real-time Multilingual Transcription: Our app, developed based on the latest GPT-4.1 technology, Our APP integrates advanced transcription capabilities, offers accurate real-time multilingual transcription in Various. accurately convert speech into Multilingual text and intelligent generation of summaries and mind maps. enhancing daily productivity. This ai voice recorder with playback can handle a full day of lectures, meetings, learning, and other scenarios with ease.

Two way Real time translation function: Supports fast translation, The Voice Recorder has a unique two-way translation function. It helps you communicate with people who speak other languages ​​in real time. Click on the recording function of the simultaneous interpretation function on the mobile APP. When recording, the voice will be translated into the target language in real time. enables you to communicate across international borders without barriers, best helper for international travel.

Ultra thin Tiny But Mighty: Voice Recorder Featuring a sleek 0.11" aluminum alloy build, Enjoy ample storage with 64GB, accommodating up to 500 hours of recordings. Plus, relish 30 hours of continuous record on a single charge

Voice Recorder Free AI Ecosystem: All users can enjoy 400 minutes of advanced AI-driven transcription and summarization services for free each month (upgradable to 1200 mins). Use the app to trim recordings and Editing the transcribed file, label speakers visually, import external audio, and manage files effortlessly. Note: If you need more minutes, you can subscribe to the Pro Plan or purchase more transcription time.

Recording Device your privacy comes first: Local and cloud file encryption is dedicated to you, data processing is only performed with your authorization,—your recordings stay secure on the audio recorder and your phone. The App completes cloud backups in 0.5 seconds. Easily connect your recording device to your iOS, Mac, Windows PC and Android devices using the magnetic cable to connect the device. Manage audio files by naming, sorting and sharing.
We provide a lifetime warranty: If you encounter any issues, please contact our after-sales customer service. We will respond to your after-sales needs as soon as possible within 12 hours!
